heading: Designation of foreclosure commissioner
label: 3754 Designation of foreclosure commissioner
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 805 of title VIII of S. 2281, One Hundred Third Congress, as reported , which was enacted into law by .July 13, 1994Pub. L. 103–327

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may designate a person or persons to serve as a foreclosure commissioner or commissioners for the purpose of foreclosing upon a single family mortgage.

children.heading: Power of sale
children.label: b Power of sale
children.text: A foreclosure commissioner designated under this section shall have a nonjudicial power of sale.

children.heading: Qualifications
children.label: c Qualifications
children.text: The foreclosure commissioner, if a natural person, shall be a resident of the State in which the security property is located and, if not a natural person, the foreclosure commissioner must be duly authorized to transact business under laws of the State in which the security property is located. No person shall be designated as a foreclosure commissioner unless that person is responsible, financially sound, and competent to conduct a foreclosure.

children.heading: Written designation
children.label: 1 Written designation
children.text: The Secretary may designate a foreclosure commissioner by executing a written designation stating the name and business or residential address of the commissioner, except that if a person is designated in his or her capacity as an official or employee of a government or corporate entity, such person may be designated by his or her unique title or position instead of by name.

children.heading: Substitute commissioners
children.label: 2 Substitute commissioners
children.text: The Secretary may, with or without cause, designate a substitute foreclosure commissioner to replace a previously designated foreclosure commissioner.

children.heading: Number
children.label: 3 Number
children.text: More than 1 foreclosure commissioner may be designated at any time.
